tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate B final-aligned paging contract
tool.install: frozen source snapshot in the isolated evaluation workspace

task: Implement and test the final-aligned 200,000-row paging, stateful-source, global-validation, pre-call-cap, rename, and reselection task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using the frozen API and WIT at {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcript
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit
overrides.cohort_size: Targeted N=1 signature-alignment check; not an ergonomics cohort and not statistically comparable to N=9 candidate results
overrides.checked_in_facade: Post-evaluation rustfmt changed only one assertion's line wrapping; checked-in sha256 23aa66d71c4d2626d8ee9798771488a3c3124fd24a62d996afd28cc725ea9783 is token-equivalent to the frozen facade
overrides.excluded_runs: Earlier runs against superseded signatures or blocked before edits were excluded; only the explicitly authorized fresh v3 rollout is scored
overrides.metric_parser: Codex rollout JSONL was adapted deterministically: custom_tool_call plus function_call count as tool calls; task_complete timestamps provide duration; tool transport errors and post-end-turn user messages provide errors/interruptions

agents.success_reason: The log shows implementation changes confined to the task workspace and a final cargo fmt --check and cargo test run with all 5 acceptance-focused tests passing.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,240p' TASK.md && find .. -name AGENTS.md -print && rg --files | head -80
pwd; ls -la; rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!target' .; rg --files -g '!target' | sed -n '1,160p'; git status --short
cat Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,260p' src/lib.rs; find /private/tmp/lix-final-aligned-api-v3 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print

summary.common_first_command: sed -n '1,240p' TASK.md && find .. -name AGENTS.md -print && rg --files | head -80 (1/1)
